---
title: "Báo cáo Tồn kho tấm pin"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
css: styles.css
date: '`r format(Sys.Date(), "%d/%m/%Y")`'
---

<style type="text/css">
  body{
  font-size: 13pt;
  font-family: Serif
}
</style>

<style type="text/css">
.main-container {
  max-width: 80% !important;
  margin: auto;
}
</style>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
#library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(repr)
library(dplyr)
library(DT)
library(highcharter)
library(readxl)
library(shiny)
#library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(formattable)
library(scales)
library(crosstalk)
library(reactable)
library(stringi)
#library(rgdal)
library(ggthemes)
library(ggiraph)
library(googlesheets4)
library(shinydashboard)
library(shinyWidgets)

writeLines(
  paste0('{"buildTime": "', format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), '"}'),
  "last-build.json"
)
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
nv_aio <- read_excel("data/nv_aio_bc.xlsx")
ton_di_duong <- read_excel("data/ton_di_duong_bc.xlsx")
ton_wms <- read_excel("data/ton_wms_bc.xlsx")
ton_chuanhap <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx")
khu_vuc <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet2")
nv_b2b <- read_excel("data/ton_chuanhap.xlsx", sheet = "B2B")
now <- format(
  as.POSIXct(Sys.time(), tz = "Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh"), 
  "%d/%m/%Y %H:%M:%S"
)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
nv_aio <- left_join(nv_aio, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
ton_di_duong <- left_join(ton_di_duong, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
ton_di_duong$Loai_kho <- "CNCT"
ton_wms <- left_join(ton_wms, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
nv_b2b <- left_join(nv_b2b, khu_vuc, by = "ma_moi")
ton_chuanhap$Loai_kho <- "CNCT"
```


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
ton_wms %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton_wms = sum(so_pin),
            kho_kv_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "KV1" | Loai_kho == "KV2" | Loai_kho == "KV3"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_cnct_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_ttqh_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "TTQH"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_cn_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CN"], na.rm = TRUE),
            kho_cn_coHD_wms = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CN" & so_HD > 0], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_wms_bc

ton_di_duong %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton_diduong = sum(so_pin_hd),
            kho_cnct_diduong = sum(so_pin_hd[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_diduong_bc

ton_chuanhap %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton_chuanhap = sum(so_pin),
            kho_cnct_chuanhap = sum(so_pin[Loai_kho == "CNCT"], na.rm = TRUE)) -> ton_chuanhap_bc
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
nv_aio %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_so_HD = sum(so_HD),
            tong_gtri_HD = sum(gtri_HD)/10^6,
            tong_pin_b2c = sum(so_pin_hd),
            so_HD_tamung = sum(so_da_tam_ung),
            so_pin_tamung = sum(so_pin_tam_ung)) -> nv_aio_bc

nv_b2b %>%
  filter(hang_hethong != "Đã xuất ra công trình") %>%
  group_by(ma_moi, KV, Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_pin_b2b = sum(so_pin)) -> nv_b2b_bc
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
###BẢNG TỔNG HỢP
tong_ton <- full_join(ton_wms_bc, ton_diduong_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, ton_chuanhap_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0
tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(tong_ton = tong_ton_wms + tong_ton_diduong + tong_ton_chuanhap,
         ton_kv = kho_kv_wms,
         ton_cnct = kho_cnct_wms + kho_cnct_diduong + kho_cnct_chuanhap,
         kho_cn_noHD = kho_cn_wms - kho_cn_coHD_wms)

tong_ton <- tong_ton[c(1:3, 14, 4, 10, 12, 15, 16, 7, 8,9,17)]

tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_aio_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton <- full_join(tong_ton, nv_b2b_bc, by = c("ma_moi", "KV", "Loai_pin"))
tong_ton[is.na(tong_ton)] <- 0
tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(tong_pin_can = so_pin_tamung + tong_pin_b2b,
         du_pin_saucap = tong_ton - tong_pin_can)
tong_ton <- tong_ton[-c(14:17)]

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  mutate(ma_moi = case_when(
    ma_moi == "COV1-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV1",
    ma_moi == "COV2-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV2",
    ma_moi == "COV3-Công ty CP Công trình Viettel" ~ "COV3",
    TRUE ~ ma_moi
  ))

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>%
  filter(Loai_pin != "TCT_Pin khác" & Loai_pin != "CN_Pin khác" )

tong_ton <- tong_ton %>% arrange(Loai_pin, KV, ma_moi)

tong_ton %>%
  group_by(Loai_pin) %>%
  summarise(tong_ton = sum(tong_ton),
            tong_ton_wms = sum(tong_ton_wms),
            tong_ton_diduong = sum(tong_ton_diduong),
            tong_ton_chuanhap = sum(tong_ton_chuanhap),
            ton_kv = sum(ton_kv),
            ton_cnct = sum(ton_cnct),
            kho_ttqh_wms = sum(kho_ttqh_wms),
            kho_cn_wms = sum(kho_cn_wms),
            kho_cn_coHD_wms = sum(kho_cn_coHD_wms),
            kho_cn_noHD = sum(kho_cn_noHD),
            so_pin_tamung = sum(so_pin_tamung),
            tong_pin_b2b = sum(tong_pin_b2b),
            tong_pin_can = sum(tong_pin_can),
            du_pin_saucap = sum(du_pin_saucap)) -> tong_ton_x
tong_ton_x$ma_moi <- "Tổng"
tong_ton_x$KV <- "Tổng"
tong_ton_x <- tong_ton_x[c(16, 17, 1:15)]
tong_ton <- rbind(tong_ton_x, tong_ton)
```


## <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**I. TỒN KHO TẤM PIN ĐẾN ** <strong>`r now`</strong></span>
### <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**1. Tổng quan**</span>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
kq1x <- unlist(tong_ton[1])
kq2x <- unlist(tong_ton[2])
kq3x <- unlist(tong_ton[3])
kq4x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),4]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq5x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),5]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq6x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),6]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq7x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),7]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq8x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),8]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq9x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),9]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq10x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),10]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq11x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),11]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq12x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),12]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq13x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),13]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq14x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),14]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq15x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),15]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq16x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),16]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")
kq17x <- accounting(unlist(tong_ton[c(1:nrow(tong_ton)),17]), digits = 2L, format = "d", big.mark = ",")

tong_ton_tb <- data.frame(kq1x,kq2x, kq3x, kq4x,kq5x,kq6x,kq7x,kq8x,kq9x,kq10x,kq11x, kq12x,kq13x,kq14x,kq15x,kq16x,kq17x)
tong_ton_tb[4:17] <- lapply(tong_ton_tb[4:17], as.numeric)
rownames(tong_ton_tb) <- NULL
```

```{r,out.width = '150%', echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(reactable)

loai_pin_values <- sort(unique(tong_ton_tb$kq3x))

update_footer_js <- "
function updateFooters() {
  setTimeout(function() {
    var state = Reactable.getState('tong_ton_table');
    if (!state || !state.sortedRows) return;
  }, 150);
}
"

filters <- tagList(
  tags$script(HTML(update_footer_js)),
  div(
    style = "display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;",
    div(
      style = "width: 250px;",
      tags$label("Loại pin", style = "font-weight: bold; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px;"),
      tags$select(
        id = "filter_loai_pin",
        style = "width: 100%; padding: 6px 10px; border: 1px solid #ccc;
                 border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; height: 34px;",
        onchange = "Reactable.setFilter('tong_ton_table', 'kq3x', this.value || undefined);",
        tags$option(value = "", "-- Tất cả --"),
        lapply(loai_pin_values, function(v) tags$option(value = v, v))
      )
    ),
    div(
      style = "margin-top: 20px;",
      tags$button("\U0001f504 Reset",
        style = "padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #ccc;
                 border-radius: 4px; background: #f5f5f5; font-size: 14px;",
        onclick = "
          document.getElementById('filter_loai_pin').value = '';
          Reactable.setFilter('tong_ton_table', 'kq3x', undefined);
        "
      )
    ),
    div(
      style = "margin-top: 20px;",
      tags$button("\u2b07 T\u1ea3i Excel",
        style = "padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid #28a745;
                 border-radius: 4px; background: #28a745; color: white; font-size: 14px;",
        onclick = "window._taiExcel && window._taiExcel(this)"
      )
    )
  )
)

shiny::fluidRow(
  shiny::column(
    9,
    filters,
    reactable(tong_ton_tb,
              elementId = "tong_ton_table",
              minRows = 3, width = 1720, height = "auto", pagination = FALSE, groupBy = "kq2x",
              columnGroups = list(
                colGroup("Tổng tồn kho", columns = c("kq3x","kq4x","kq5x","kq6x","kq7x"), sticky = "left",
                         headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#F56222", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center")),
                colGroup("Loại kho", columns = c("kq8x","kq9x","kq10x","kq11x","kq12x","kq13x"), sticky = "left",
                         headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#009900", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center")),
                colGroup("Số pin cần cấp", columns = c("kq14x","kq15x","kq16x","kq17x"), sticky = "left",
                         headerStyle = list(color = "white", background = "#3333CC", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"))
              ),
              resizable = TRUE, searchable = TRUE,
              bordered = TRUE, highlight = TRUE, style = list(fontSize = "16px"),
              rowStyle = JS("
  function(rowInfo, state) {
    // Hàng tổng: KV = 'Tổng' → chữ đỏ
    if (rowInfo.values['kq2x'] && rowInfo.values['kq2x'].toString().startsWith('T\u1ed5ng')) {
      return {
        color: '#CC0000',
        fontWeight: 'bold',
        background: '#FFF5F5',
        borderTop: '2px solid #CC0000',
        borderBottom: '2px solid #CC0000'
      };
    }
    // Group rows khác
    if (rowInfo.subRows && rowInfo.subRows.length > 0) {
      return { backgroundColor: '#FFFFFF', fontWeight: 'bold', color: '#000000',
               borderLeft: '2px solid transparent', transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease' };
    }
    // Leaf rows
    return { borderLeft: '2px solid #ffa62d', backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
             transition: 'background-color 0.2s ease' };
  }
"),
              theme = reactableTheme(
                headerStyle = list(background = "#F56222"),
                rowStyle = list(`&:hover` = list(backgroundColor = "#FFE4CC !important", cursor = "pointer"))
              ),
              defaultColDef = colDef(
  style = list(whiteSpace = "nowrap"),          # ← cell không wrap
  headerStyle = list(
    whiteSpace = "normal",                       # ← header wrap
    wordBreak = "break-word",
    textAlign = "center"
  )
),
              striped = FALSE,
              columns = list(

                kq1x = colDef(name = "Mã tỉnh",
  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
  aggregate = JS("function(values, rows) { return values.join(', ') }"),
  aggregated = JS("function(cellInfo) {
    return React.createElement('span', {
      title: cellInfo.value,   // tooltip xem đầy đủ khi hover
      style: {
        cursor: 'help',
        fontWeight: 'bold',
        whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
        overflow: 'hidden',
        textOverflow: 'ellipsis',
        display: 'block',
        maxWidth: '100px'
      }
    }, cellInfo.value);
  }"),
  style = JS("
    function(rowInfo, state) {
      if (rowInfo.subRows && rowInfo.subRows.length > 0) {
        return {
          cursor: 'help',
          fontWeight: 'bold',
          backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
          textDecoration: 'underline dotted',
          whiteSpace: 'nowrap',
          overflow: 'hidden',
          textOverflow: 'ellipsis'
        };
      } else {
        return {
          backgroundColor: '#f5f5f5',
          whiteSpace: 'nowrap'
        };
      }
    }
  "),
  align = "left", width = 100),

                kq2x = colDef(name = "KV",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  cell = JS("function(cellInfo) {
                    return '<span title=\"Group ' + cellInfo.value + '\">' + cellInfo.value + '</span>' }"),
                  html = TRUE, aggregate = "count", align = "left", width = 150),

                kq3x  = colDef(name = "Loại pin",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "count", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq4x  = colDef(name = "Tổng tồn kho",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq5x  = colDef(name = "Tồn trên WMS",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq6x  = colDef(name = "Tồn đi đường",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq7x  = colDef(name = "Chưa nhập kho",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#F5DEB3", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq8x  = colDef(name = "Kho KV",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq9x  = colDef(name = "Kho CNCT",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq10x = colDef(name = "Kho TTQH",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq11x = colDef(name = "Kho cá nhân",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq12x = colDef(name = "Kho CN có HĐ",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq13x = colDef(name = "Kho CN không HĐ",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#C8E2B1", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
                  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE)),

                kq14x = colDef(name = "B2C đã tạm ứng",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq15x = colDef(name = "B2B",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100),

                kq16x = colDef(name = "Tổng pin cần",
                  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
                  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 90),

                kq17x = colDef(name = "Dư pin sau cấp",
  headerStyle = list(color = "black", background = "#BFCAE6", whiteSpace = "normal", textAlign = "center"),
  aggregate = "sum", align = "right", width = 100,
  format = colFormat(digits = 0, separators = TRUE),
  style = JS("
    function(rowInfo) {
      var val = rowInfo.values['kq17x'];
      if (val < 0) {
        return { background: '#FFE5E5', color: '#CC0000', fontWeight: 'bold' };
      } else if (val > 0) {
        return { background: '#E5F5E5', color: '#006600', fontWeight: 'bold' };
      }
      return {};
    }
  "))
              )
    )
  )
)
```

### <span style="color: #C35817;font-family: cambria;">**2. Biểu đồ tồn kho - pin cần cấp**</span>
#### <span style="color: ##3366CC;font-family: cambria;">**2.1. Tỷ lệ pin cần cấp so với pin tồn kho**</span>
```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
###BẢNG BIỂU ĐỒ
tong_ton[-c(1:5),c(1:4,16)] -> plot_ton
plot_ton %>%
  mutate(
    ty_le = tong_pin_can*100/tong_ton
  ) -> plot_ton
```

```{r,out.width = '120%',fig.width=7, fig.height=4, echo = FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(highcharter)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(htmltools)

# ── Chuẩn bị data ──────────────────────────────────────────
thu_tu_kv <- plot_ton %>%
  group_by(KV) %>%
  summarise(tong = sum(tong_ton, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  arrange(desc(tong)) %>%
  pull(KV)

plot_ton$KV    <- factor(plot_ton$KV, levels = thu_tu_kv)
plot_ton       <- plot_ton %>% arrange(KV, ma_moi)

# Lấy danh sách Loai_pin
loai_pin_list  <- sort(unique(plot_ton$Loai_pin))
default_pin    <- "Longi 615"

# Lọc data mặc định
plot_default   <- plot_ton %>% filter(Loai_pin == default_pin)

# Toàn bộ data theo JSON để JS filter
plot_ton_json <- plot_ton %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))

all_data_json <- toJSON(plot_ton_json, auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")
loai_pin_json  <- toJSON(loai_pin_list, auto_unbox = TRUE)

# ── Hàm tạo chart từ data đã lọc ───────────────────────────
make_chart_data <- function(df) {
  kv_groups <- df %>%
    mutate(idx = row_number() - 1) %>%
    group_by(KV) %>%
    summarise(n_cols = n(), .groups = "drop")

  list(
    ma_moi       = df$ma_moi,
    tong_ton     = round(df$tong_ton, 0),
    tong_pin_can = round(df$tong_pin_can, 0),
    ty_le        = round(df$ty_le, 0),
    kv_groups    = list(
      KV     = as.character(kv_groups$KV),
      n_cols = kv_groups$n_cols
    ),
    n_total = nrow(df)
  )
}

default_data      <- make_chart_data(plot_default)
default_data_json <- toJSON(
  list(
    ma_moi       = as.character(default_data$ma_moi),
    tong_ton     = default_data$tong_ton,
    tong_pin_can = default_data$tong_pin_can,
    ty_le        = default_data$ty_le,
    kv_groups    = list(
      KV     = as.character(default_data$kv_groups$KV),
      n_cols = default_data$kv_groups$n_cols
    ),
    n_total = default_data$n_total
  ),
  auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null"
)

# ── Tạo filter dropdown ─────────────────────────────────────
filter_ui <- div(
  style = "margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;",
  tags$label("Loại pin:", 
    style = "font-weight:bold; font-family:Cambria; font-size:14px;"),
  tags$select(
    id = "filter_loai_pin",
    style = "padding:4px 10px; font-size:13px; font-family:Cambria;
             border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;",
    lapply(loai_pin_list, function(p) {
      if (p == default_pin) {
        tags$option(value = p, selected = "selected", p)
      } else {
        tags$option(value = p, p)
      }
    })
  )
)

# ── Tạo highchart ───────────────────────────────────────────
hc <- highchart() %>%
  hc_chart(type = "column", marginBottom = 80) %>%
  hc_xAxis(
    categories = default_data$ma_moi,
    labels     = list(style = list(fontSize = "11px", fontFamily = "cambria")),
    crosshair  = list(width = 40, color = "rgba(180,180,180,0.2)", zIndex = 0)
  ) %>%
  hc_title(
    text   = "Tỷ lệ số pin cần cấp so với số pin tồn kho",
    margin = 20, align = "center",
    style  = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold",
                  fontFamily = "cambria", fontSize = "20px")
  ) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    column = list(states = list(hover    = list(color = NULL),
                                inactive = list(opacity = 0.3))),
    series = list(states = list(inactive = list(opacity = 0.3)))
  ) %>%
  hc_yAxis_multiples(
    list(lineWidth = 3,
         title  = list(text  = "Số pin",
                       style = list(fontWeight = "bold", fontSize = "15px", fontFamily = "cambria")),
         labels = list(style = list(fontSize = "12px", fontFamily = "cambria"))),
    list(showLastLabel = TRUE, opposite = TRUE,
         title  = list(text  = "%HT",
                       style = list(fontWeight = "bold", fontSize = "15px", fontFamily = "cambria")),
         labels = list(style = list(fontSize = "12px", fontFamily = "cambria")))
  ) %>%
  hc_add_series(
    name = "Tổng pin tồn",
    data = as.list(default_data$tong_ton),
    states = list(hover = list(color = "#808080"))
  ) %>%
  hc_add_series(
    name = "Số pin cần cấp",
    data = as.list(default_data$tong_pin_can),
    states = list(hover = list(color = "#8DB600"))
  ) %>%
  hc_add_series(
    name       = "Tỷ lệ (%)",
    data       = as.list(default_data$ty_le),
    type       = "spline", yAxis = 1,
    dataLabels = list(enabled = TRUE, format = "{y}%")
  ) %>%
  hc_tooltip(
    shared = TRUE, useHTML = TRUE,
    formatter = JS("
      function() {
        var s = '<b>' + this.x + '</b><br/>';
        var tong_ton = 0, tong_pin_can = 0, ty_le = 0;
        for (var i = 0; i < this.points.length; i++) {
          var nm  = this.points[i].series.name;
          var val = this.points[i].y;
          if (nm === 'Tổng pin tồn')   tong_ton     = val;
          if (nm === 'Số pin cần cấp') tong_pin_can = val;
          if (nm === 'Tỷ lệ (%)')      ty_le        = val;
        }
        s += '<span style=\"color:#D9D9D9\">●</span> Tổng pin tồn: <b>' +
               Highcharts.numberFormat(tong_ton, 0, '.', ',') + '</b><br/>';
        s += '<span style=\"color:#C84309\">●</span> Số pin cần cấp: <b>' +
               Highcharts.numberFormat(tong_pin_can, 0, '.', ',') + '</b><br/>';
        s += '<span style=\"color:#645889\">●</span> Tỷ lệ (%): <b>' + ty_le + '%</b>';
        return s;
      }
    ")
  ) %>%
  hc_colors(c("#D9D9D9", "#C84309", "#645889")) %>%
  hc_legend(
    labels = list(style = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold",
                               fontFamily = "cambria", fontSize = "14px"))
  ) %>%
  hc_exporting(enabled = TRUE, filename = "ton-kho-pin")

# ── onRender với filter ─────────────────────────────────────
hc <- onRender(hc, paste0("
function(el, x) {
  var allData     = ", all_data_json, ";
  var defaultData = ", default_data_json, ";

  function getChart() {
    for (var i = 0; i < Highcharts.charts.length; i++) {
      var c = Highcharts.charts[i];
      if (c && c.renderTo && el.contains(c.renderTo)) return c;
    }
    return null;
  }

  function getFilteredData(loaiPin) {
    var filtered = allData.filter(function(r) {
      return r.Loai_pin === loaiPin;
    });
    filtered.sort(function(a, b) {
      if (a.KV < b.KV) return -1;
      if (a.KV > b.KV) return 1;
      return a.ma_moi < b.ma_moi ? -1 : 1;
    });
    var kvMap = {};
    filtered.forEach(function(r) {
      if (!kvMap[r.KV]) kvMap[r.KV] = 0;
      kvMap[r.KV]++;
    });
    return {
      ma_moi       : filtered.map(function(r) { return r.ma_moi; }),
      tong_ton     : filtered.map(function(r) { return Math.round(r.tong_ton || 0); }),
      tong_pin_can : filtered.map(function(r) { return Math.round(r.tong_pin_can || 0); }),
      ty_le        : filtered.map(function(r) { return Math.round(r.ty_le || 0); }),
      kv_groups    : { KV: Object.keys(kvMap), n_cols: Object.values(kvMap) },
      n_total      : filtered.length
    };
  }

  function drawKVLabels(chart, groups, N, el) {
    var pLeft   = chart.plotLeft;
    var pRight  = chart.chartWidth - pLeft - chart.plotWidth;
    var colW    = chart.plotWidth / N;
    var nGroups = groups.KV.length;
    var pullUp  = chart.marginBottom - 25;

    el.style.position = 'relative';
    el.querySelectorAll('._kv_sep, ._kv_row').forEach(function(o) { o.parentNode.removeChild(o); });

    var cumCols = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < nGroups - 1; i++) {
      cumCols += groups.n_cols[i];
      var sep = document.createElement('div');
      sep.className = '_kv_sep';
      sep.style.cssText = [
        'position:absolute',
        'left:' + Math.round(pLeft + cumCols * colW) + 'px',
        'top:' + chart.plotTop + 'px',
        'width:1px',
        'height:' + (chart.plotHeight + 18) + 'px',
        'border-left:1px dashed #999999',
        'pointer-events:none',
        'z-index:3'
      ].join(';');
      el.appendChild(sep);
    }

    var row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = '_kv_row';
    row.style.cssText = [
      'display:flex',
      'margin-top:-' + pullUp + 'px',
      'padding-left:' + pLeft + 'px',
      'padding-right:' + pRight + 'px',
      'width:' + chart.chartWidth + 'px',
      'box-sizing:border-box',
      'pointer-events:none'
    ].join(';');

    for (var j = 0; j < nGroups; j++) {
      var cell = document.createElement('div');
      cell.textContent = groups.KV[j];
      cell.style.cssText = [
        'flex:' + groups.n_cols[j],
        'text-align:center',
        'font-size:12px',
        'font-family:Cambria,serif',
        'font-weight:bold',
        'color:#333333',
        'border-top:2px solid #555555',
        'padding-top:4px'
      ].join(';');
      row.appendChild(cell);
    }
    el.appendChild(row);
  }

  function updateChart(loaiPin) {
    var d     = getFilteredData(loaiPin);
    var chart = getChart();
    if (!chart) return;
    chart.xAxis[0].setCategories(d.ma_moi, false);
    chart.series[0].setData(d.tong_ton,     false);
    chart.series[1].setData(d.tong_pin_can, false);
    chart.series[2].setData(d.ty_le,        false);
    chart.redraw();
    setTimeout(function() {
      drawKVLabels(chart, d.kv_groups, d.n_total, el);
    }, 300);
  }

  function init() {
    var chart = getChart();
    if (!chart || !chart.plotWidth) { setTimeout(init, 300); return; }

    // Vẽ KV labels mặc định
    drawKVLabels(chart, defaultData.kv_groups, defaultData.n_total, el);

    // ← Dùng el.closest() để tìm filter trong cùng block
    var wrapper = el.closest('.filter-chart-block');
    var sel = wrapper
      ? wrapper.querySelector('select')
      : document.getElementById('filter_loai_pin');

    if (sel) {
      // Sync chart với giá trị mặc định của dropdown
      updateChart(sel.value);

      sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
        updateChart(this.value);
      });
    }
  }

  setTimeout(init, 300);
  setTimeout(init, 800);
  setTimeout(init, 1500);
}
"))

# ── Ghép filter + chart ─────────────────────────────────────
browsable(
  div(class = "filter-chart-block",
    tagList(filter_ui, hc)
  )
)

```


#### <span style="color: ##3366CC;font-family: cambria;">**2.2. Số pin còn dư - thiếu sau khi cấp**</span>

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, results = 'hide', echo = FALSE}
###BẢNG BIỂU ĐỒ TỒN PIN SAU KHI CẤP
tong_ton[-c(1:5),c(1:3,17)] -> plot_du
```


```{r, out.width='120%', echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(jsonlite)
library(highcharter)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(htmltools)

# ── Chuẩn bị data ──────────────────────────────────────────
loai_pin_list <- sort(unique(plot_du$Loai_pin))
default_pin   <- "Longi 615"

plot_default  <- plot_du %>%
  filter(Loai_pin == default_pin) %>%
  arrange(KV, ma_moi)

# Convert factor → character
plot_du_json <- plot_du %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.factor), as.character))

all_data_json <- toJSON(plot_du_json, auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null")

# ── Hàm tạo màu theo giá trị ───────────────────────────────
make_colored_data <- function(df) {
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(df)), function(i) {
    val <- df$du_pin_saucap[i]
    list(
      y     = round(val, 0),
      color = if (!is.na(val) && val >= 0) "#2ECC71" else "#E74C3C"
    )
  })
}

# ── Tạo KV groups từ data mặc định ─────────────────────────
make_kv_groups <- function(df) {
  kv_groups <- df %>%
    group_by(KV) %>%
    summarise(n_cols = n(), .groups = "drop")
  list(
    KV     = as.character(kv_groups$KV),
    n_cols = kv_groups$n_cols
  )
}

default_colored   <- make_colored_data(plot_default)
default_cats      <- plot_default$ma_moi
default_kv_groups <- make_kv_groups(plot_default)
default_n_total   <- nrow(plot_default)

default_data_json <- toJSON(
  list(
    ma_moi        = plot_default$ma_moi,
    du_pin_saucap = round(plot_default$du_pin_saucap, 0),
    kv_groups     = default_kv_groups,
    n_total       = default_n_total
  ),
  auto_unbox = TRUE, na = "null"
)

# ── Filter UI ───────────────────────────────────────────────
filter_ui <- div(
  style = "margin-bottom:12px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;",
  tags$label("Loại pin:",
    style = "font-weight:bold; font-family:Cambria; font-size:14px;"),
  tags$select(
    id = "filter_loai_pin_du",
    style = "padding:4px 10px; font-size:13px; font-family:Cambria;
             border:1px solid #ccc; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer;",
    lapply(loai_pin_list, function(p) {
      if (p == default_pin) {
        tags$option(value = p, selected = "selected", p)
      } else {
        tags$option(value = p, p)
      }
    })
  )
)

# ── Highchart ───────────────────────────────────────────────
hc <- highchart() %>%
  hc_chart(type = "column", marginBottom = 80) %>%
  hc_title(
    text  = "Dư pin sau cấp theo tỉnh",
    align = "center",
    style = list(color = "black", fontWeight = "bold",
                 fontFamily = "cambria", fontSize = "18px")
  ) %>%
  hc_xAxis(
    categories = default_cats,
    labels     = list(style = list(fontSize = "11px", fontFamily = "cambria")),
    crosshair  = TRUE
  ) %>%
  hc_yAxis(
    title = list(
      text  = "Số pin dư",
      style = list(fontWeight = "bold", fontSize = "14px", fontFamily = "cambria")
    ),
    labels = list(style = list(fontSize = "12px", fontFamily = "cambria")),
    plotLines = list(list(
      value = 0, color = "#333333", width = 1.5, zIndex = 5
    ))
  ) %>%
  hc_add_series(
    name         = "Dư pin sau cấp",
    data         = default_colored,
    showInLegend = FALSE,
    dataLabels   = list(
      enabled = TRUE,
      format  = "{y}",
      style   = list(fontSize = "10px", fontFamily = "cambria",
                     fontWeight = "bold", textOutline = "none")
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_tooltip(
    useHTML = TRUE,
    formatter = JS("
      function() {
        var color = this.y >= 0 ? '#2ECC71' : '#E74C3C';
        return '<b>' + this.x + '</b><br/>' +
               '<span style=\"color:' + color + '\">●</span> ' +
               'Dư pin sau cấp: <b>' +
               Highcharts.numberFormat(this.y, 0, '.', ',') +
               '</b>';
      }
    ")
  ) %>%
  hc_plotOptions(
    column = list(
      borderRadius = 3,
      states = list(hover = list(brightness = 0.1))
    )
  ) %>%
  hc_exporting(enabled = TRUE, filename = "du-pin-sau-cap")

# ── onRender với filter + KV labels ────────────────────────
hc <- onRender(hc, paste0("
function(el, x) {
  var allData     = ", all_data_json, ";
  var defaultData = ", default_data_json, ";

  function getChart() {
    for (var i = 0; i < Highcharts.charts.length; i++) {
      var c = Highcharts.charts[i];
      if (c && c.renderTo && el.contains(c.renderTo)) return c;
    }
    return null;
  }

  function makeColoredData(arr) {
    return arr.map(function(v) {
      return {
        y: Math.round(v || 0),
        color: (v >= 0) ? '#2ECC71' : '#E74C3C'
      };
    });
  }

  function getFilteredData(loaiPin) {
    var filtered = allData.filter(function(r) {
      return r.Loai_pin === loaiPin;
    });
    filtered.sort(function(a, b) {
      if (a.KV < b.KV) return -1;
      if (a.KV > b.KV) return 1;
      return a.ma_moi < b.ma_moi ? -1 : 1;
    });
    var kvMap = {};
    filtered.forEach(function(r) {
      if (!kvMap[r.KV]) kvMap[r.KV] = 0;
      kvMap[r.KV]++;
    });
    return {
      cats      : filtered.map(function(r) { return r.ma_moi; }),
      vals      : filtered.map(function(r) { return r.du_pin_saucap; }),
      kv_groups : { KV: Object.keys(kvMap), n_cols: Object.values(kvMap) },
      n_total   : filtered.length
    };
  }

  function drawKVLabels(chart, groups, N, el) {
    var pLeft   = chart.plotLeft;
    var pRight  = chart.chartWidth - pLeft - chart.plotWidth;
    var colW    = chart.plotWidth / N;
    var nGroups = groups.KV.length;
    var pullUp  = chart.marginBottom - 25;

    el.style.position = 'relative';
    el.querySelectorAll('._kv_sep, ._kv_row').forEach(function(o) {
      o.parentNode.removeChild(o);
    });

    // Đường nét đứt phân chia KV
    var cumCols = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < nGroups - 1; i++) {
      cumCols += groups.n_cols[i];
      var sep = document.createElement('div');
      sep.className = '_kv_sep';
      sep.style.cssText = [
        'position:absolute',
        'left:' + Math.round(pLeft + cumCols * colW) + 'px',
        'top:' + chart.plotTop + 'px',
        'width:1px',
        'height:' + (chart.plotHeight + 18) + 'px',
        'border-left:1px dashed #999999',
        'pointer-events:none',
        'z-index:3'
      ].join(';');
      el.appendChild(sep);
    }

    // Label tên KV bên dưới
    var row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = '_kv_row';
    row.style.cssText = [
      'display:flex',
      'margin-top:-' + pullUp + 'px',
      'padding-left:' + pLeft + 'px',
      'padding-right:' + pRight + 'px',
      'width:' + chart.chartWidth + 'px',
      'box-sizing:border-box',
      'pointer-events:none'
    ].join(';');

    for (var j = 0; j < nGroups; j++) {
      var cell = document.createElement('div');
      cell.textContent = groups.KV[j];
      cell.style.cssText = [
        'flex:' + groups.n_cols[j],
        'text-align:center',
        'font-size:12px',
        'font-family:Cambria,serif',
        'font-weight:bold',
        'color:#333333',
        'border-top:2px solid #555555',
        'padding-top:4px'
      ].join(';');
      row.appendChild(cell);
    }
    el.appendChild(row);
  }

  function updateChart(loaiPin) {
    var d     = getFilteredData(loaiPin);
    var chart = getChart();
    if (!chart) return;

    chart.xAxis[0].setCategories(d.cats, false);
    chart.series[0].setData(makeColoredData(d.vals), false);
    chart.redraw();

    setTimeout(function() {
      drawKVLabels(chart, d.kv_groups, d.n_total, el);
    }, 300);
  }

  function init() {
    var chart = getChart();
    if (!chart || !chart.plotWidth) { setTimeout(init, 300); return; }

    // Vẽ KV labels mặc định
    drawKVLabels(chart, defaultData.kv_groups, defaultData.n_total, el);

    // Gắn sự kiện filter
    var wrapper = el.closest('.filter-chart-block-du');
    var sel = wrapper
      ? wrapper.querySelector('select')
      : document.getElementById('filter_loai_pin_du');

    if (sel) {
      updateChart(sel.value);
      sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
        updateChart(this.value);
      });
    }
  }

  setTimeout(init, 300);
  setTimeout(init, 800);
  setTimeout(init, 1500);
}
"))

# ── Ghép filter + chart ─────────────────────────────────────
browsable(
  div(class = "filter-chart-block-du",
    tagList(filter_ui, hc)
  )
)
```
